assumptions: The HTML sanitizer is stripping <style> tags and inline CSS needed for CSS animations
The SVG sanitizer is too restrictive and removing animation elements like <animate> and gradients
The HtmlBlockRenderer may not properly handle or preserve CSS from the HTML content
The SvgRenderer may not support advanced SVG features like gradients and animations

input_quality.reasoning: Input contains structured sections including Environment, Preconditions, Steps to Reproduce, Expected Result, Actual Result, Suspected Areas, and Scope & Impact. Has clear requirements (expected behavior) and acceptance criteria (expected vs actual results). Promoted spec.md with extracted requirements.
